ingredients.text: Ricotta Soft Cheese and Spinach Filling

ingredients_text: 53% Ricotta Soft Cheese and Spinach Filling (35% Ricotta Soft Cheese (Milk) (contains Acid: Citric Acid), 20% Spinach, Dried Potato Flakes [Potato, Antioxidant: Extracts of Rosemary], Breadcrumbs [Wheat Flour, Yeast, Salt], Rapeseed Oil, Whey Powder (Milk), 5% Mascarpone Soft Cheese (Milk) (contains Acid: Citric Acid), Hydrogenated Rapeseed Oil, Rice Flour, Iodised Salt [Salt, Potassium Iodide], Natural Flavouring (contains Milk), Garlic Purée [Garlic, Salt], Ground Nutmeg), 47% Egg Pasta (Wheat Flour, 30% Egg, Durum Wheat Semolina).
